an10.70:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. Now on that occasion, after their meal, on returning from their alms round, a number of bhikkhus had assembled in the assembly hall and were sitting together engaging in various kinds of pointless talk, that is: talk about kings, thieves, and ministers of state … talk about becoming this or that.
an10.70:1.2: "Bhikkhus, there are these ten grounds for praise. What ten?
an10.70:1.3: (1) "Here, a bhikkhu is himself of few desires and speaks to the bhikkhus on fewness of desires. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself of few desires and speaks to the bhikkhus on fewness of desires.’
an10.70:1.4: (2) "He is himself content and speaks to the bhikkhus on contentment. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself content ….’
an10.70:1.5: (3) "He is himself given to solitude and speaks to the bhikkhus on solitude. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself given to solitude ….’
an10.70:1.6: (4) "He is himself not bound up with others and speaks to the bhikkhus on not being bound up with others. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself not bound up with others ….’
an10.70:1.7: (5) "He is himself energetic and speaks to the bhikkhus on arousing energy. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself energetic ….’
an10.70:1.8: (6) "He is himself accomplished in virtuous behavior and speaks to the bhikkhus on accomplishment in virtuous behavior. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself accomplished in virtuous behavior ….’
an10.70:1.9: (7) "He is himself accomplished in concentration and speaks to the bhikkhus on accomplishment in concentration. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself accomplished in concentration ….’
an10.70:1.10: (8) "He is himself accomplished in wisdom and speaks to the bhikkhus on accomplishment in wisdom. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself accomplished in wisdom ….’
an10.70:1.11: (9) "He is himself accomplished in liberation and speaks to the bhikkhus on accomplishment in liberation. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself accomplished in liberation ….’
an10.70:1.12: (10) "He is himself accomplished in the knowledge and vision of liberation and speaks to the bhikkhus on accomplishment in the knowledge and vision of liberation. This is a ground for praise: ‘The bhikkhu is himself accomplished in the knowledge and vision of liberation and speaks to the bhikkhus on accomplishment in the knowledge and vision of liberation.’
an10.70:1.13: "These, bhikkhus, are the ten grounds for praise."
